title: SOA-Harness v1.0 Permission Decision Response
description: Normative schema for the 201 Created response body of POST /permissions/decisions (Core §10.3.2). The endpoint runs §10.3 steps 1-5, writes an audit record, optionally emits a PermissionDecision StreamEvent, and returns the recorded decision.

decision.description: Terminal decision. MUST match what /permissions/resolve would report for the same (tool, session_id) pair — forgery-resistance (§10.3.2).

reason.description: Closed enum from §10.3.1's reason set, or pda-verify-failed / pda-decision-mismatch for PDA-specific failures.

audit_record_id.description: Identifier of the audit row written for this decision. Callers reconcile via /audit/records.

audit_this_hash.description: this_hash of the appended audit row. Equals the §10.5 hash-chain value — callers asserting not-a-side-effect on /permissions/resolve compare THIS endpoint's response before/after instead (since this endpoint IS side-effectful by contract).

handler_accepted.description: True when the PDA (if required) verified against security.trustAnchors, or when the decision was AutoAllow/Deny/CapabilityDenied (handler not required). False ONLY when a required PDA failed verification — in that case decision is coerced to Deny with reason=pda-verify-failed and an audit row is still written (the attempt itself is auditable).
